mechanism_checked: index.html fetches data/verified-problems.json and data/verified-diagnostic-2024cee.json, filters publishable source_verified problems, then maps each page/node by knowledge_ids and model_ids.
notes: This confirms every id-map node can receive at least one student-facing verified problem through the same knowledge_ids/model_ids mapping used by index.html.
This audit is independent of the older scripts/check.js example-system coverage number, which intentionally reports 211/226 using the legacy page/core example pool.
X3-39 remains covered by MS-UNIT-INTERACTION-01; its formal-source upgrade is recorded separately in audit/results/source-missing-gaps.json.
